_publications._publicationTitle: PET imaging for attention deficit preclinical drug testing in neurofibromatosis-1 mice.

_contextSnippet: we demonstrate a 10% reduction in the expression of presynaptic (VMAT2 and DAT) DA transporters, but normal expression of postsynaptic D1, D2, and D3 receptors
details: 10% reduction in expression of presynaptic VMAT2 and DAT transporters (p=.03, p=.0004; N=6)
